top_signals.title: Apple partnering with Google and Nvidia for most advanced AI model
top_signals.summary: Apple's artificial intelligence strategy took center stage at its Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, Calif.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto has ‘limited utility’ in solving AI’s trust and payment issues, IC3 researchers say
top_signals.summary: The academic researchers attempt to debunk idea that giving AI agents access to crypto wallets has the ability to make them autonomous.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Indonesia’s Five-Year Bond Yield Climbs to Highest Since 2020
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s five-year bond yield climbed to the highest level in more than six years as a debt market selloff deepened.

top_signals.title: Trump booed before Knicks lose to Spurs at Madison Square Garden in NBA Finals Game 3
top_signals.summary: Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.
